bugs.title: Cross-tenant billing balance data leak via workspaceId parameter
Manage Subscription button navigates to /usage instead of billing portal
/billing/subscription returns 404 plus many other missing endpoints
POST /billing/webhook returns 502 Bad Gateway for event processing
Login rate-limiter shows generic error instead of specific rate-limit message
bugs.area: Auth UI — Login form error messaging

bugs.title: Enterprise plan missing from /billing/plans + storageMb/priceCents/interval fields absent
POST /marketplace/install returns 500 for nonexistent listing (should be 404)
Marketplace anonymous access redirects to login (should be public)

TC-BILLING-PLANS.notes: Key endpoints missing (subscription, cancel, upgrade, limits, topup/history, grant, revoke all 404). /billing/plans works but enterprise plan absent and schema fields differ.

TC-BILLING-CREDITS.notes: /billing/balance works but accepts any workspaceId without ownership check (critical security). Display shows wrong values in UI (-400/100).

TC-BILLING-PORTAL.notes: /billing/portal works (returns Stripe URL). Manage Subscription CTA incorrectly navigates to /usage. /billing/invoices and /billing/payment-methods both 404.

TC-BILLING-TOPUP.notes: /billing/topup/packages works. POST /billing/topup works (returns Stripe checkout URL in non-bypass mode). /billing/topup/history 404.

TC-BILLING-WEBHOOK.notes: Missing/invalid signature paths (pre-parse) return correct 400. All paths requiring body processing return 502 Bad Gateway.

TC-MARKET-LIST.notes: Listings API works for authenticated users. Anonymous access blocked. Sort values: API accepts popular/newest/rating (not most_installed/highest_rated). /feed.json 401. Categories endpoint works.

TC-MARKET-INSTALL.notes: No published listings in dev environment so most install tests skipped. Install with nonexistent ID returns 500 instead of 404.

TC-MARKET-REVIEW.notes: All /marketplace/reviews endpoints return 404 — feature not implemented.

TC-MARKET-MODERATION.notes: All /marketplace/reports and moderation endpoints return 404 — feature not implemented.

TC-MARKET-PUBLISH-LISTING.notes: Listing creation API exists but requires all fields. Publish flow partially tested — no listings published in dev yet.

environment_notes: Stripe is NOT in bypass mode on dev — real Stripe checkout URLs returned for topup/upgrade
No published marketplace listings exist in dev environment
Login rate limiter active — required fresh token provisioning during test run
